creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
The attached patch updates the editors/emacs-devel port to a CVS
snapshot from 2006.08.13.19.02.57.

The distfile I just uploaded to ~/public_distfiles hasn't hit the FTP
mirrors yet, but you can find a copy of exactly the same file at:

http://people.freebsd.org/~keramida/emacs/distfiles/emacs-cvs-snapshot-2006.08.13.19.02.57.tar.bz2

PS (to ports-committers): Andrey will most likely pick up this ports/XXX
PR, so please don't reassign it to me.  I am not a ports committer and
Andrey has kindly offered to review & commit my port updates, so let him
handle it instead.  Thanks in advance.
